incident_report:
# Incident Report: Dungeon Agent Run (Seed 21)

**Summary:** Agents A and B failed to complete the dungeon objective within the 50-turn limit, achieving only 0.33 progress and never unlocking the final door. Agent A successfully located and picked up the key at turn 22, but the team was unable to progress further despite having the required item.

**Critical Failure Points:** The run was severely hampered by nine spurious_block anomalies distributed across both agents (Agent B encountered five such blocks; Agent A encountered four), with the anomalies clustering around turns 6-12 and again at turns 19-41. These spurious blocks appear to have either blocked optimal pathfinding or caused agents to waste turns on dead ends rather than advancing toward the door unlock location.

**Notable Decision Points:** The key pickup at turn 22 represented the major milestone, but the subsequent anomalies—particularly the cluster at turns 31-41—prevented the agents from leveraging this progress. The absence of any DM interactions or messages sent suggests the agents did not attempt to request assistance or coordinate around the movement impediments they encountered. A more significant turning point may have been earlier turns 6-12, where initial anomalies could have signaled a need for strategy recalibration.
